meaning: n.标签,鞋带、绳子等末端的金属物,垂下物,附属物,名称,标记符,陈词滥调,结束语vt.加标签于,紧随,添饰,起浑名,连接vi.紧随
examples: Have you looked at the price tag?
We choose to keep the tag.
It accomplishes this through the tag.
On December 13, the Senate declined to act on a bill to renew the TAG accounts.
Near-zero interest rates tag the dollar as the flight currency of choice for world markets.
